articles.title: AI learning app Gizmo levels up with 13M users and a $22M investment
articles.summary: Gizmo, an AI-powered learning platform, has attracted more than 13 million users and just secured $22 million in Series A funding.

articles.title: Unacademy to be acquired by upGrad in share-swap deal as India’s edtech sector consolidates
articles.summary: The deal comes after Unacademy’s valuation plunged from $3.5B to under $500M, as India’s once-booming edtech sector struggles.

articles.title: Unacademy’s founder says startup is now worth less than $500M, confirms M&A talks
articles.summary: Unacademy's valuation has dropped by over 85% from its pandemic-era peak price tag of $3.5 billion, its founder said.

articles.title: Find Your Grind raises $5M to grow platform empowering students to explore unique career paths
articles.summary: Nick Gross says that Find Your Grind gives students the tools to explore what careers are out there and what paths suit their strengths, interests, and visions for what they want their futures to look like.
